## How was this tested?

## Checklist

- [ ] Commit subjects follow conventional commits (`fix(selm): ...`, `feat(stf): ...`, `docs: ...`)
- [ ] `cmd/` contains no business logic; logic lives in `internal/`
- [ ] PR is focused; unrelated changes are split out
